blended.narrative: Le Relais is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 44 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 42°F.
Wednesday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
